title: Validate And Close Out Deplanification
summary: Refreshes derived surfaces, validates the changed docs and registries, and closes the initiative cleanly.
scope_items: Rebuild affected indexes and derived plan surfaces after the shared-language edits.
Run targeted validation for changed standards, registries, and repository-wide validation surfaces as needed.
Commit the validated slice and close the initiative if no further shared-core wording drift remains in scope.
done_when_items: The affected docs and registries validate cleanly, the derived surfaces are refreshed, the tranche is committed, and the initiative can be closed without open blockers.
